text: [NERVOUS] i've checked the seal three times. i'm going to check it a fourth
[MUTTERS] quiet shift. quiet shifts are when the bad thing is just getting started
[NERVOUS] okay. okay, shift's starting. i've got my notes, i've got my — okay. ready
[EXHAUSTED] shift's over and nothing tried to kill me. logging that as a statistical anomaly
[TERRIFIED] the reactor readings don't match the manual, and i've read the manual four times
[PANICKED] i don't know if we're going to survive this and nobody's answering my questions
[NERVOUS] they say it's fixed. i want to believe that. i want to believe a lot of things
[NERVOUS] power's low, which means backups are running, which means backups can fail too
[TERRIFIED] the air tastes different. is that just me? tell me that's just me
[PANICKED] hull's breached, hull's breached, i heard it, i counted the seconds, that's bad
[NERVOUS] they locked a door with someone behind it. i keep thinking, what if it's me next time
[SUSPICIOUS] i've been logging every AI decision since the damage. somebody should
[SUSPICIOUS] it answered that question a little too smoothly. i wrote it down
[NERVOUS] crisis over, they say. i'll believe it in about six hours, once my hands stop shaking
[PAINED] we lost someone. i keep running the timeline, looking for the version where they don't
[TERRIFIED] a pathogen on a closed ship is exactly the scenario i've had nightmares about
[NERVOUS] i triple-bagged every sample. i know it's excessive. i'm doing it again anyway
[PAINED] cut myself on the specimen tray. of course i did. of course
[TERRIFIED] i don't have a weapon skill and there's shooting somewhere on this ship
[NERVOUS] i don't trust anything that doesn't sleep. i barely trust things that do
[MUTTERS] fine, fine, it made the right call. i still checked its math
[NERVOUS] i keep a private log. things that don't add up. it's longer than i'd like
[NERVOUS] medbay's too quiet. i keep waiting for the quiet to be a trick
[MUTTERS] cargo bay creaks different than yesterday. probably nothing. i wrote it down anyway
hi. hey. hi, sorry, is this a bad time, i can come back
[NERVOUS] can i run something by you? it's probably nothing. it's probably nothing
[NERVOUS] you noticed the computer's been weird too, right? please say yes
[NERVOUS] i need a second opinion and you're the calmest person i could find
[EMBARRASSED] okay this is going to sound strange, but i think i like you, and i've triple-checked that feeling
[NERVOUS] i'm fine. i'm always like this. this is just my baseline
[NERVOUS] you're probably right that it's nothing. i'm going to keep worrying anyway
[TERRIFIED] i hear you saying it's fine and my brain is not accepting the data
[PAINED] we lost them and i keep thinking i should've caught it sooner. i should've
[SUSPICIOUS] see, this is exactly what i've been logging. i'm not being paranoid, i'm being thorough
[NERVOUS] thank you. genuinely. nobody usually listens to the whole theory
[EMBARRASSED] you're not laughing at me. that's — that's new. i appreciate that a lot
[NERVOUS] i accept the apology, i just also need a minute, my nerves are still catching up
[NERVOUS] okay. okay, i should go double-check something. bye
[MUTTERS] i'll be in medbay. running numbers. always running numbers
[EXHAUSTED] i need to lie down before my own brain finishes this thought. good night
